name: playwright-test-analytics
description: Playwright test reporting and analytics dashboard

scripts.install-all: npm install && npm install -w packages/shared && npm install -w packages/reporter && npm install -w packages/backend && npm install -w packages/frontend
scripts.dev: npm run dev -w packages/backend & npm run dev -w packages/frontend
scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build -w packages/backend && npm run build -w packages/frontend
